accessibility.hidePassword.description: Accessible label for hiding a password value in an authentication field.

accessibility.openCart.defaultMessage: Open cart with {count, plural, =0 {no items} one {# item} other {# items}}
accessibility.openCart.description: Accessible label for opening the cart.

accessibility.showPassword.description: Accessible label for revealing a password value in an authentication field.

auth.action.signIn.description: Primary authentication action shown on sign-in CTAs.

auth.action.signUp.description: Primary authentication action shown on account creation CTAs.

auth.deviceChallenge.message.defaultMessage: Approve this browser in the security checkpoint to continue.
auth.deviceChallenge.message.description: Instruction shown when a protected route requires trusted-device approval.

auth.deviceChallenge.title.description: Heading shown when a protected route requires trusted-device approval.

auth.pending.resolveSession.description: Loading message shown while a protected route checks the current session.

auth.pending.title.description: Short heading shown while account/session access is being checked.

auth.security.passwordHidden.description: Accessible action when the password is currently hidden.

auth.security.passwordVisible.description: Accessible action when the password is currently visible.

auth.signIn.description: Primary action for signing into an Aura account.

cart.action.addToCart.description: Action that adds a product to the shopper cart.

cart.action.removeFromCart.description: Action that removes a product from the shopper cart.

cart.status.empty.description: Empty-state title for a cart with no products.

checkout.action.back.description: Secondary checkout navigation action that returns to the previous step.

checkout.action.continue.description: Primary checkout navigation action that advances to the next step.

checkout.action.placeOrder.description: Final checkout action that submits an order.

checkout.amountDue.description: Checkout amount label using locale-aware numeric formatting.

checkout.delivery.dateLabel.description: Label for the checkout delivery date input.

checkout.delivery.selectSlot.description: Placeholder option for choosing a checkout delivery slot.

checkout.delivery.stepTitle.description: Checkout step heading for selecting delivery speed and slot.

checkout.delivery.windowLabel.description: Label for the checkout delivery time-window input.

checkout.deliveryDate.description: Checkout delivery date label using locale-aware date formatting.

checkout.otp.cancelRetry.description: Action for cancelling the current payment OTP challenge and trying again.

checkout.otp.closeDialog.description: Accessible label for closing the payment OTP challenge dialog.

checkout.otp.didNotReceive.description: Prompt shown near the payment OTP challenge retry action.

checkout.otp.digitLabel.description: Accessible label for an individual payment OTP digit input.

checkout.otp.subtitle.defaultMessage: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your registered contact.
checkout.otp.subtitle.description: Instruction text for the payment OTP challenge modal.

checkout.otp.title.description: Title for the payment OTP challenge modal.

checkout.otp.verify.description: Action button label for submitting the payment OTP challenge.

checkout.otp.verifying.description: Busy state shown while the payment OTP challenge is being verified.

checkout.payNow.description: Primary checkout action that starts payment.

checkout.status.paymentFailed.description: Short payment status shown when authorization or capture fails.

checkout.status.paymentPending.description: Short payment status shown while payment is waiting for completion.

checkout.status.paymentSuccess.description: Short payment status shown after payment authorization or capture succeeds.

common.itemCount.defaultMessage: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {# item} other {# items}}
common.itemCount.description: Cart or order item count with plural handling.

errors.generic.defaultMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.generic.description: Safe generic error shown when a specific recovery message is unavailable.

nav.cart.description: Navigation label for the shopping cart.

order.status.confirmed.description: Order status shown after the backend has accepted the order.

payment.error.generic.defaultMessage: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
payment.error.generic.description: Safe generic payment error when no provider-specific message is available.

payment.error.retry.description: Action for restarting a failed or stale payment attempt.

rewards.auraPoints.description: Aura loyalty points brand name. Keep Aura untranslated.

status.updatedAt.description: Status timestamp using locale-aware time formatting.
